series_metadata.series_title: Employees Certification of Personal Calls From State Phone
series_metadata.series_description: NRP-80 This form used to document and certify personal phone calls from state telephone. Original attached to monthly telephone bill, personal check to cover personal calls to be included if necessary, copy retained in park files.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after audit then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
